sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f: search f values (0.01–1.0) via iteration/parabolic interpolation to maximize Equation 4.17 (real TWR using geometric mean). When geometric mean ≤ 0, allocate zero position size. When positive, allocate optimal f fraction of capital.

source_rule_text: Do not allocate any resources when the geometric mean is negative; optimize position sizing by searching through f values to maximize the equation while accounting for 99% of possible outcomes.
